text_excerpt: Campaigns | Rishi Sunak MP Skip to main content Main navigation About Me Latest News My Plan Campaigns Contact Campaigns Friarage Hospital's future is secured Rishi has settled the future of Northallerton's Friarage Hospital after opening its new surgical hub. He secured the Government funding required to build the... Making Wainwright's Coast to Coast Walk a National Trail Rishi has welcomed the passing of a major milestone to back his campaign to make the famous Coast to Coast Walk a National Trail. Dualling the A66 Rishi has welcomed a Government decision to press ahead with the £1.4bn plans his Government had for making the A66 Trans-Pennine route a dual carriageway along... Working for a safer A19 Rishi has secured safety improvements on the A19 - one of the busiest roads in North Yorkshire. Working with his neighbouring MP Kevin Hollinrake, Rishi has... Better mobile and broadband connectivity for all Rishi continues to help residents and businesses in the remotest parts of the constituency access superfast broadband and 4G mobile phone coverage.
